Bash('/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr create --title 'fix\(a1-sarah\): unblock closing step — timeout, chunking, stable memory' --body ':*)

Bash(node -e "const wf = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('agents/a1-sarah-hr-manager/workflow.json','utf8'\)\); const sarah = wf.nodes.find\(n => n.name === 'Sarah Agent'\); console.log\('valid JSON, nodes:', wf.nodes.length\); console.log\('systemMessage first 200:', sarah.parameters.options.systemMessage.slice\(0,200\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='agents/a1-sarah-hr-manager/system-prompt.xml'; let c=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\); if\(!c.endsWith\('\\n'\)\) fs.writeFileSync\(p,c+'\\n'\); console.log\('ok'\);")
